reviews.review_description: This game is sick! I love playing this. You should definitely play with friends, I heard they are dropping a new horror mode 👀🔥 but anyway, great game! I recommend you to play

developer_response.body: Thx Zeek! Good to have you here and thanks for the rating!

reviews.review_description: This is a good well-made game ￼ and I actually put effort into it which I love ￼

developer_response.body: That's so good to hear! thanks again for your review. We're always updating, so would love to hear what you think of the horror mode that's been voted for to create next!
